title: senecio hercynicus subsp. hercynicus
intro: Senecio hercynicus subsp. hercynicus, also known as Hercynian ragwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. Its health benefits include soothing coughs, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
